name: intelligence-briefing
description: v1.1.0 — Start the day knowing what actually moved in your world — and exactly how much of it the system looked at to say so. A rotation-driven scan collects against a coverage matrix, keeps the forces in your world under continuous assessment, and comes back to check the tripwires it wrote down; the daily brief reports what moved, not what got published, with a collection-health line on every page. Tell it what it missed and it gets sharper. Exports warm drivers to Strategic Foresight. Self-contained; runs on its own.
